name: editor4c: link toolbar wraps the selection in an <a href> via window.prompt
_note: Phase B — link gesture through window.prompt. The toolbar Link button calls `window.prompt('Link URL:', 'https://')` then `cmdToggleMark(s, 'link', url)` on the selection. Headless `view` has no dialog UI, so `set_prompt` seeds the answer (new js_dom.cpp window.prompt response queue + event_sim SET_PROMPT). Double-click selects a word in the h1 (which has no link initially), seed the URL, click Link → the word gains an <a href>. Asserts a fresh anchor in the h1 carrying the seeded href.
